pattern_observations: Wave-1 DISPATCHED on the already-running ysbh6 vast pod (80-core, ~48 free) instead of fresh rent -> $0 incremental, no QE provisioning, no vastai CLI (not installed locally). nice -n 15 -np 8 each, coexists with ysbh6 32 ph.x (~48/80 total, no thrash).
prterun (OpenMPI 5.x) refused root -> fixed with --allow-run-as-root; stale scf.out truncated before exec (feedback_stale_temp_files).

Both candidates are CALIBRATION anchors (MgB2 39K measured, Nb3Al ~18K) -> success = cross-tool-consistency (g5) match within a few K, NOT a 200K discovery. Reproducing measured non-hydride Tc validates the el-ph pipeline against the hydride-only V3 ledger.
Expected N5-wall generality result: non-hydride conventional SC stays << hydride ladder (h3cl 140K) -> confirms the hydride advantage is real, not a pipeline artifact.
harvest_trigger: armed terminal watchers bcj87r6lw (mgb2) / bk7iwcckj (nb3al) fire on chain.log 'CHAIN DONE'; event-driven, no ScheduleWakeup. On fire: harvest lambda_BZ/omega_log/Tc -> hexa verify allen_dynes_tc (g5 verbatim) -> apply success_criteria below -> persist exports/material_discovery/.

success_criteria_pre_declared.policy: harvest 전에 사전 선언된 Δ — Tc_DFT vs Tc_measured 차이로 PASS/AMBER/RED 판정 (사후 합리화 방지). gap-priority P2 close (F4 falsifier + F5 success-criteria).

mgb2_pure.RED_K_outside: Tc < 19 or Tc > 59 -> 파이프라인 결함 의심 (PBE+rrkjus가 MgB2에 부적합하다는 lit 인지 가정 surface)

nb3al.RED_K_outside: Tc < 0 (의미없음) or Tc > 38 -> 파이프라인 결함 의심

success_criteria_pre_declared.falsifier_pre_declared: 둘 다 RED 영역 -> 비수소화물 el-ph 파이프라인 systemic 결함, 본 hydride ledger의 신뢰성 의심 -> H3S/CaH6 측정-grade DFT 재교차 필요. 한쪽 RED + 한쪽 PASS -> 후자 victim-system 추정, 단발 결함.

m_sign_mapping.policy: 후보를 m=(lambda-2.5)/lambda 축에 매핑하여 ESCAPE/TRAPPED 분류 — 본 pilot은 deep TRAPPED 극단 anchor. doc: domains/RTSC/walls/m_sign_classification.md
